TableDescription: Generic harvest table for beasts of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: The carcass ruptures; take 1d4 slashing damage from snapping bones and teeth.
FumbleEffect: You slip and ruin the best cut; the meat yield is halved.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for beasts of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: The carcass snaps shut reflexively; take 1d6 piercing damage.
FumbleEffect: You nick a bile duct; the nearby cuts are contaminated and one item is lost.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for beasts of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: The carcass convulses with dying muscle spasms; take 2d6 bludgeoning damage.
FumbleEffect: You sever a pressurized vessel; the spray blinds you until the end of your next turn.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for beasts of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: The creature's apex physiology lashes back even in death; take 3d6 slashing damage.
FumbleEffect: You damage the primary hide section; one material item you would have recovered is destroyed.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for undead of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: Necrotic energy discharges from the corpse; take 1d4 necrotic damage.
FumbleEffect: The foul ichor splashes your hands; you have disadvantage on Dexterity checks until you wash them.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for undead of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: Necrotic energy erupts from the remains; take 1d8 necrotic damage.
FumbleEffect: The necrotic vapors sting your eyes; disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks for 1 minute.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for undead of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: A burst of deathly energy erupts; take 2d8 necrotic damage and make a DC 14 Constitution save or gain one level of exhaustion.
FumbleEffect: Necrotic residue clings to your tools; they must be cleaned before being used for any other harvesting.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for undead of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: The soul animating the remains spitefully releases in a wave; take 3d8 necrotic damage and make a DC 17 Wisdom save or be frightened for 1 minute.
FumbleEffect: The overwhelming aura of death leaves you shaken; you cannot willingly approach another undead corpse for 10 minutes.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for dragons of CR 0-1 (typically wyrmlings).
CritFailEffect: The wyrmling's residual breath energy discharges; take 1d6 elemental damage (type matches the dragon).
FumbleEffect: A scale pops free and cuts you; take 1d4 piercing damage.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for dragons of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: Residual breath energy fires erratically; take 2d6 elemental damage (type matches the dragon).
FumbleEffect: A jagged scale slices your palm; take 1d6 slashing damage.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for dragons of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: The breath gland ruptures explosively; all creatures within 10 feet take 3d6 elemental damage (DC 15 Dexterity save for half).
FumbleEffect: The scales shift and lock around your hand briefly; you are restrained until you use a bonus action to pull free.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for dragons of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: The death-throes release a final breath; all creatures within 20 feet take 4d10 elemental damage (DC 18 Dexterity save for half).
FumbleEffect: The sheer magical density of the corpse overwhelms you; you lose one spell slot of your highest available level.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for monstrosities of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: The carcass collapses unexpectedly; take 1d4 bludgeoning damage.
FumbleEffect: You tear the hide unevenly; one material item is of poor quality and worth half price.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for monstrosities of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: The creature's barbed hide snags your tools; take 1d6 piercing damage and your harvesting tools are damaged.
FumbleEffect: You pull too hard on a sinew; you strain a muscle and have disadvantage on Strength checks for 1 hour.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for monstrosities of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: A defensive spine or toxic spray activates posthumously; take 2d6 poison damage and make a DC 13 Constitution save or be poisoned for 1 minute.
FumbleEffect: The creature's mass shifts as you work; you are knocked prone.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for monstrosities of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: The creature's apex defenses trigger in death; take 3d8 damage of the creature's primary damage type and make a DC 16 saving throw or suffer the associated condition for 1 minute.
FumbleEffect: The harvesting draws unwanted attention; a predator within 1 mile detects the kill and begins moving toward you.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for fiends of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: A burst of infernal energy scorches your hands; take 1d6 fire damage.
FumbleEffect: The infernal ash irritates your lungs; you cough for 1 minute and have disadvantage on Stealth checks.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for fiends of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: The fiend's essence violently resists extraction; take 2d6 fire damage and make a DC 12 Wisdom save or be frightened for 1 minute.
FumbleEffect: Infernal ichor eats through one of your harvesting tools; a blade or probe is destroyed.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for fiends of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: The fiend screams with its last breath; all creatures within 15 feet make a DC 14 Wisdom save or be frightened for 1 minute. You also take 2d8 fire damage.
FumbleEffect: The infernal aura lingers on you; you have disadvantage on Charisma checks with celestials and good-aligned creatures for 24 hours.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for fiends of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: The fiend's death curse activates; you take 4d8 fire damage and are cursed â€” you have disadvantage on death saving throws until the curse is removed.
FumbleEffect: The fiend's true name brands itself on your mind; you suffer from nightmares and lose the benefit of a long rest.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for aberrations of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: Alien thought-fragments discharge from the corpse; make a DC 11 Intelligence save or take 1d6 psychic damage.
FumbleEffect: The non-Euclidean anatomy confounds you; you lose 1 minute of harvesting time orienting yourself.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for aberrations of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: Psionic feedback from the corpse; take 2d6 psychic damage and make a DC 13 Intelligence save or be incapacitated until the end of your next turn.
FumbleEffect: The alien biology bleeds an irritant; you have disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws for 1 hour.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for aberrations of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: A psychic death-scream erupts; all creatures within 10 feet take 3d6 psychic damage and must make a DC 15 Wisdom save or be stunned until the end of their next turn.
FumbleEffect: Your mind briefly touches the Far Realm through the corpse; you are confused and make all attacks at disadvantage until the end of your next turn.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for aberrations of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: The aberration's death opens a momentary rift; make a DC 18 Intelligence save or be transported 1d4 x 10 feet in a random direction.
FumbleEffect: The incomprehensible anatomy permanently marks you; you gain one level of madness (per the DMG rules on indefinite madness).

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for celestials of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: Divine reprisal for desecrating the remains; take 1d8 radiant damage.
FumbleEffect: The divine light fades rapidly; you work in sudden dimness and accidentally damage one sample.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for celestials of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: A burst of radiant energy burns your hands; take 2d8 radiant damage.
FumbleEffect: The sanctified aura overwhelms you; you are blinded until the end of your next turn.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for celestials of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: The celestial's soul departs in a blinding flash; all creatures within 15 feet take 3d8 radiant damage and must make a DC 15 Constitution save or be blinded for 1 minute.
FumbleEffect: The sheer holiness of the remains burns an impure soul; if you have committed an evil act in the past 24 hours you are frightened for 1 minute.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for celestials of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: Divine judgment descends; take 4d10 radiant damage and make a DC 18 Wisdom save or be stunned for 1 minute.
FumbleEffect: The act of harvesting a celestial of this power taints you; you have disadvantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks with good-aligned creatures for 7 days.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for constructs of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: A released spring or mechanism strikes you; take 1d6 piercing damage.
FumbleEffect: A gear locks around your finger; you have disadvantage on fine manipulation until you pry it free (1 action).

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for constructs of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: The construct's animating force discharges; take 2d6 lightning damage.
FumbleEffect: A pressurized component vents; you are pushed 5 feet backward and are deafened until the end of your next turn.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for constructs of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: The central power source detonates; all creatures within 10 feet take 3d6 lightning damage (DC 14 Dexterity save for half).
FumbleEffect: The arcane feedback fries your nervous system briefly; you cannot take reactions until the end of your next turn.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for constructs of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: The master construct's core overloads catastrophically; all creatures within 20 feet take 4d10 force damage (DC 18 Dexterity save for half) and are knocked prone.
FumbleEffect: The arcane resonance disrupts your magic; you lose your highest available spell slot or recharge ability.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for elementals of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: The dying elemental lashes out; take 1d6 damage of the element's type.
FumbleEffect: The elemental material partially absorbs into your skin; you have vulnerability to the element's damage type for 1 minute.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for elementals of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: A surge of elemental energy erupts; take 2d6 damage of the element's type.
FumbleEffect: The residual elemental force buffets you; you are pushed 10 feet in a direction determined by the element type.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for elementals of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: The elemental detonates as its planar tether breaks; all creatures within 15 feet take 3d8 damage of the element's type (DC 14 saving throw for half).
FumbleEffect: The elemental essence lingers on you; you leave a trail (footprints of fire/ice/earth/water) for 1 hour.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for elementals of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: The elder elemental's death sends a planar shockwave; all creatures within 20 feet take 4d10 damage of the element's type and are restrained until the end of their next turn (DC 18 save negates the restrained condition).
FumbleEffect: The raw primal power is too much to contain; half the Condensed Element or Pure Elemental Essence you harvest disintegrates on contact with air.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for fey of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: The fey's death curse triggers; take 1d4 psychic damage and flowers bloom painfully from your ears for 1 minute (no mechanical effect but deeply embarrassing).
FumbleEffect: The glamour unravels in a dazzling burst; you are blinded until the start of your next turn.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for fey of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: The fey's dying glamour twists reality briefly; you are polymorphed into a rabbit for 1 round (no save).
FumbleEffect: The fey's charm leaks out; you are charmed by the next creature you see for 1 minute.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for fey of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: The fey's final curse takes hold; make a DC 15 Charisma save or be cursed to speak only in rhyme for 24 hours (disadvantage on Charisma checks that require normal speech).
FumbleEffect: The glamour resonance destabilizes your appearance; you have disadvantage on Charisma (Persuasion) and Charisma (Deception) checks for 1 hour.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for fey of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: The archfey-touched creature's death warps the local Weave; all creatures within 20 feet must make a DC 18 Charisma save or be transported to a random point within 100 feet.
FumbleEffect: The power of the Feywild asserts itself; the harvested materials slowly transform into flowers over the next hour unless you succeed on a DC 18 Arcana check to stabilize them.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for giants of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: The corpse shifts as you harvest; take 1d6 bludgeoning damage as a limb falls on you.
FumbleEffect: Your tools bend under the giant's dense materials; harvesting takes twice as long.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for giants of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: The giant's mass collapses; take 2d6 bludgeoning damage and make a DC 13 Strength save or be knocked prone.
FumbleEffect: You misjudge the scale of the anatomy; you harvest blood from the wrong vessel and the sample is contaminated.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for giants of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: The giant's bulk shifts and crushes you; take 3d6 bludgeoning damage and make a DC 15 Strength save or be restrained until you use an action to escape (DC 15 Athletics).
FumbleEffect: A bone shard the size of a dagger flies free; take 1d8 piercing damage.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for giants of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: The titan-class giant's death rattles the earth; make a DC 17 Dexterity save or take 4d6 bludgeoning damage from shifting debris and be knocked prone.
FumbleEffect: The titanic scale of the work strains you; gain one level of exhaustion.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for humanoids of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: The remains collapse and lacerate your hands; take 1d4 slashing damage.
FumbleEffect: The grim work unsettles your stomach; you have disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws for 10 minutes.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for humanoids of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: The corpse's weapon or trap snags you; take 1d6 damage of an appropriate type.
FumbleEffect: You are disturbed by your own actions; you must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or have the shaken condition for 1 hour (disadvantage on attack rolls).

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for humanoids of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: The hardened warrior's remains resist your efforts violently; take 2d8 slashing damage from the armor and weapons.
FumbleEffect: Something about this kill haunts you; you have disadvantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks for 24 hours as guilt shadows your expression.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for humanoids of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: A contingency or death ward on the corpse triggers; take 4d8 damage of an appropriate type and make a DC 17 saving throw or suffer an additional effect (DM's discretion based on the enemy's abilities).
FumbleEffect: The legend of this individual's deeds makes the harvesting deeply uncomfortable; make a DC 16 Wisdom save or gain a short-term madness (per DMG).

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for oozes of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: The ooze's acid is still active; take 1d6 acid damage.
FumbleEffect: The acidic residue eats through one non-metal item in your pack (DM picks the least expensive item).

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for oozes of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: The ooze's acid discharges in a wave; all creatures within 5 feet take 2d6 acid damage.
FumbleEffect: Your tools are partially dissolved; they have a -1 penalty to harvest checks until repaired.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for oozes of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: The ooze dissolves rapidly and takes your tools with it; take 2d8 acid damage and lose your harvesting kit unless you succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity save.
FumbleEffect: The acidic vapors sting your eyes and lungs; you have disadvantage on Perception checks and Constitution saves for 10 minutes.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for oozes of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: The ooze's corrosive mass engulfs your arm; take 4d10 acid damage and make a DC 18 Constitution save or suffer one level of exhaustion from the chemical burns.
FumbleEffect: Your entire harvesting kit is dissolved; you cannot perform any more harvesting until you obtain a new kit.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for plants of CR 0-1.
CritFailEffect: The plant creature's barbs or sap sprays into your eyes; take 1d4 poison damage and be blinded until the end of your next turn.
FumbleEffect: The plants wilt faster than expected; one herb or material item you would have harvested rots before you can collect it.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for plants of CR 2-4.
CritFailEffect: Toxic sap erupts; take 2d4 poison damage and make a DC 12 Constitution save or be poisoned for 1 minute.
FumbleEffect: Spores cloud your vision; you have disadvantage on all checks requiring sight for 10 minutes.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for plants of CR 5-10.
CritFailEffect: Explosive seed pods discharge; take 3d6 piercing damage and make a DC 14 Dexterity save or be restrained by vines for 1 minute.
FumbleEffect: The plant matter grows aggressively across your tools; you must spend 1 minute cutting it free.

TableDescription: Generic harvest table for plants of CR 11 or higher.
CritFailEffect: The ancient plant spirit releases in a death-storm; all creatures within 20 feet take 4d8 piercing and poison damage (DC 17 Constitution save for half) and are restrained by erupting roots (DC 17 Strength to break free).
FumbleEffect: The plant's death triggers a cascade of growth; vines immediately cover a 20-foot radius and the area becomes difficult terrain for 1 hour.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a common wolf (Beast CR 1/4).
CritFailEffect: The wolf's jaws snap shut reflexively; take 1d4 piercing damage from its bite.
FumbleEffect: You fumble the pelt skinning and nick an artery; lose 5 minutes cleaning up the mess and one meat portion is contaminated.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a winter wolf (Monstrosity CR 3).
CritFailEffect: Ice crystals explode from the wolf's body; take 2d6 cold damage.
FumbleEffect: The frost-bitten hide snaps stiffly; you lose your grip and must restart â€” lose 5 minutes of harvesting time.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a tyrannosaurus rex (Beast CR 8).
CritFailEffect: The dying rex's final reflex contracts its jaw; make a DC 16 Dexterity save or take 4d6 piercing damage.
FumbleEffect: You misjudge the scale of the anatomy and cut yourself on a rib shard; take 1d8 piercing damage.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a triceratops (Beast CR 5).
CritFailEffect: The massive head shifts and a horn sweeps toward you; make a DC 14 Dexterity save or take 2d8 piercing damage.
FumbleEffect: The horns are more firmly anchored than expected; you strain your back and have disadvantage on Strength checks for 1 hour.

TableDescription: Harvest table for an allosaurus (Beast CR 2).
CritFailEffect: The carcass rolls; make a DC 13 Dexterity save or take 2d6 bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone.
FumbleEffect: A hidden tooth cuts your hand through your glove; take 1d4 slashing damage.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a stegosaurus (Beast CR 4).
CritFailEffect: The tail whips as you work; make a DC 13 Dexterity save or take 2d8 piercing damage from the thagomizer.
FumbleEffect: A dorsal plate shifts and traps your hand; you are restrained for 1 round.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a velociraptor (Beast CR 1/4).
CritFailEffect: The killing claws are still sharp; take 1d6 slashing damage when the leg twitches.
FumbleEffect: You underestimate the grip of the sickle claw; it tears through your glove.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a pteranodon (Beast CR 1/4).
CritFailEffect: The beak snaps shut on your wrist; take 1d4 piercing damage.
FumbleEffect: The wing membrane tears more easily than expected; one wing membrane portion is destroyed.

TableDescription: Harvest table for an ankylosaurus (Beast CR 3).
CritFailEffect: The tail club swings on reflexive muscle contraction; make a DC 14 Dexterity save or take 2d8 bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone.
FumbleEffect: The armor plating is densely fused; your blade dulls and you have disadvantage on your next harvest check.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a troll (Giant CR 5).
CritFailEffect: The troll's regeneration briefly animates the corpse; it grabs for you and you take 2d6 slashing damage before it dies again.
FumbleEffect: The regenerating flesh keeps closing your incision points; the harvesting takes twice as long and you must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom save or be grossed out and stop early (losing the highest-DC items).

TableDescription: Harvest table for a basilisk (Monstrosity CR 3).
CritFailEffect: You accidentally meet the basilisk's gaze even in death; make a DC 12 Constitution save or be restrained as your muscles stiffen. Repeat next turn or be petrified for 1 minute.
FumbleEffect: You flinch when removing the eyes and crack one; only one eye is recoverable.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a beholder (Aberration CR 13).
CritFailEffect: The beholder's eye rays fire erratically in a death spasm; roll 1d8 for which ray strikes you (1:charm, 2:fear, 3:slow, 4:exhaustion, 5:disintegrate 4d8, 6:paralysis, 7:sleep, 8:death ray â€” DC 16 save for each).
FumbleEffect: One eye stalk fires a weakened sleep ray at you; make a DC 14 Wisdom save or fall asleep for 1 round.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a hydra (Monstrosity CR 8).
CritFailEffect: A severed head on a neck stump bites you; take 2d6 piercing damage and you must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution save or take 2d8 acid damage from its bite.
FumbleEffect: The blood is more caustic than expected; your tools take minor damage and you have disadvantage on your next skill check.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a froghemoth (Monstrosity CR 10).
CritFailEffect: The tongue lashes out on a death spasm; make a DC 15 Strength save or be grappled (Escape DC 15) and pulled into the maw for 2d8 bludgeoning damage.
FumbleEffect: Slime covers your tools and hands; you have disadvantage on all Dexterity checks for 10 minutes until you wipe off the mucus.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a yuan-ti abomination (Monstrosity CR 7).
CritFailEffect: The abomination's innate magic lashes out; take 3d6 psychic damage and make a DC 15 Wisdom save or be frightened for 1 minute.
FumbleEffect: The serpentine scales are razor-edged; take 1d6 slashing damage when removing them.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a shambling mound (Plant CR 5).
CritFailEffect: Lightning still crackles through the vines; take 2d6 lightning damage.
FumbleEffect: The dense compost is difficult to work through; you lose 10 minutes digging out the useful components.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a girallon (Monstrosity CR 4).
CritFailEffect: The girallon's powerful arms still have reflexive grip; one arm seizes your wrist for 2d6 bludgeoning damage before you pry it free.
FumbleEffect: The dense white fur clogs your tools; you have disadvantage on your next harvest check.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a grung (Humanoid CR 1).
CritFailEffect: The skin's toxin absorbs through a cut; make a DC 12 Constitution save or be poisoned for 1 minute and take 2d4 poison damage.
FumbleEffect: The poison dye stains your hands; you have disadvantage on Charisma checks with non-adventurers until you bathe.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a vegepygmy (Plant CR 1/4).
CritFailEffect: Russet mold spores puff into your face; make a DC 13 Constitution save or take 1d6 poison damage and be poisoned until you complete a short rest.
FumbleEffect: The bark is brittle and crumbles; one bark sample is worthless dust.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a black dragon (any age). Strips age prefix — Young/Adult/Ancient Black Dragon all use this table.
CritFailEffect: Acid sprays from a ruptured gland; all creatures within 10 feet take 3d8 acid damage (DC 15 Dexterity save for half).
FumbleEffect: A trickle of acid eats through your glove; take 1d4 acid damage and your tools have a -1 penalty to your next harvest check.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a blue dragon (any age). Strips age prefix — Young/Adult/Ancient Blue Dragon all use this table.
CritFailEffect: A lightning discharge arcs from the corpse; all creatures within 10 feet take 3d8 lightning damage (DC 15 Dexterity save for half).
FumbleEffect: A spark jumps to your tools; you are shocked and have disadvantage on your next harvest check.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a green dragon (any age). Strips age prefix — Young/Adult/Ancient Green Dragon all use this table.
CritFailEffect: Chlorine gas vents from the ruptured poison sac; all creatures within 10 feet must make a DC 15 Constitution save or take 3d8 poison damage and be poisoned for 1 minute.
FumbleEffect: Foul-smelling gas stings your eyes; you have disadvantage on Perception checks for 10 minutes.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a red dragon (any age). Strips age prefix — Young/Adult/Ancient Red Dragon all use this table.
CritFailEffect: The fire gland detonates in a burst of superheated flame; all creatures within 15 feet take 4d8 fire damage (DC 16 Dexterity save for half).
FumbleEffect: Residual flame scorches your hands; take 1d6 fire damage and your tools are too hot to use until the start of your next turn.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a white dragon (any age). Strips age prefix — Young/Adult/Ancient White Dragon all use this table.
CritFailEffect: Ice crystals explode from the frost gland; all creatures within 10 feet take 3d8 cold damage (DC 15 Constitution save or be restrained in ice until the end of their next turn).
FumbleEffect: A blast of cold air numbs your fingers; you have disadvantage on Dexterity checks for 5 minutes.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a boar (Beast CR 1/4).
CritFailEffect: The boar's legs kick violently in a death spasm; make a DC 12 Dexterity save or take 1d6 bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone.
FumbleEffect: You slip on the muddy bristle-hide and nick yourself; take 1d4 slashing damage.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a brown bear (Beast CR 1).
CritFailEffect: The bear's massive paw swings reflexively; make a DC 13 Strength save or take 2d6 slashing damage and be knocked prone.
FumbleEffect: The bear's dense fat is difficult to separate cleanly; you ruin one portion of fat and must discard it.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a giant spider (Beast CR 1).
CritFailEffect: A venom sac ruptures; all creatures within 5 feet must make a DC 12 Constitution save or take 2d4 poison damage and be poisoned for 1 minute.
FumbleEffect: Venom drips onto your hands; you have disadvantage on Dexterity checks for 10 minutes until you wash it off.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a skeleton (Undead CR 1/4).
CritFailEffect: Necrotic energy discharges from the bones as they clatter apart; take 1d4 necrotic damage.
FumbleEffect: The brittle bones crumble more than expected; one bone sample shatters into useless splinters.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a zombie (Undead CR 1/4).
CritFailEffect: Necrotic energy discharges from the putrefying corpse; take 1d4 necrotic damage.
FumbleEffect: The foul stench overwhelms you; you are sickened and have disadvantage on Wisdom checks for 10 minutes.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a ghoul (Undead CR 1).
CritFailEffect: Residual paralytic energy discharges on contact; make a DC 12 Constitution save or be paralyzed until the end of your next turn.
FumbleEffect: Foul ichor splashes your face; you are sickened and have disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks for 1 minute.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a wraith (Undead CR 5).
CritFailEffect: A burst of deathly cold erupts from the dissolving remains; take 3d6 necrotic damage and make a DC 15 Constitution save or gain one level of exhaustion.
FumbleEffect: The necrotic vapors cling to you; you have disadvantage on Constitution saving throws for 10 minutes.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a vampire spawn (Undead CR 5).
CritFailEffect: The vampire spawn's death curse activates; take 2d8 necrotic damage and make a DC 14 Constitution save or have your hit point maximum reduced by the damage dealt until you finish a long rest.
FumbleEffect: The body begins to decay rapidly in the light; you must work quickly — if you fail two consecutive harvest checks the body crumbles to dust.

TableDescription: Harvest table for an owlbear (Monstrosity CR 3).
CritFailEffect: The owlbear's beak snaps shut reflexively; make a DC 14 Dexterity save or take 2d8 piercing damage.
FumbleEffect: The talons are harder to remove than expected; a claw snaps off and cuts you for 1d4 slashing damage.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a manticore (Monstrosity CR 3).
CritFailEffect: Tail spikes fire erratically in a death spasm; roll 1d4 — each spike hit deals 1d8 piercing damage (DC 14 Dexterity save to avoid each).
FumbleEffect: A loose spike stabs through your boot; take 1d4 piercing damage and your movement speed is reduced by 5 feet for 10 minutes.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a mind flayer (Aberration CR 7).
CritFailEffect: A psionic death-scream erupts from the collapsing neural tissue; all creatures within 10 feet take 3d8 psychic damage and must make a DC 15 Intelligence save or be stunned until the end of their next turn.
FumbleEffect: Residual thought-fragments flood your mind; you are confused and must use a bonus action to identify friend from foe until the end of your next turn.

TableDescription: Harvest table for a gelatinous cube (Ooze CR 2).
CritFailEffect: The cube's acid suddenly releases in a wave; all creatures within 5 feet take 2d8 acid damage (DC 13 Dexterity save for half) and any non-magical items must make a DC 13 save or be dissolved.
FumbleEffect: Acidic residue coats your arms up to the elbow; you have disadvantage on Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks for 10 minutes until you rinse off.
